content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Pacific Atlantic Water Flow". Refer to LeetCode description: https://leetcode.com/problems/pacific-atlantic-water-flow/
content.inputFormat: The input is a 2D array of integers, where each integer represents the height of the cell. The first line contains two integers, m and n, representing the number of rows and columns in the grid.
content.outputFormat: The output is a 2D array of coordinates, where each coordinate represents a cell that can flow to both the Pacific and the Atlantic oceans.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use depth-first search or breadth-first search to traverse the grid and find the cells that can flow to both the Pacific and the Atlantic oceans.
